executives.name: Bruce Kiddoo
executives.background: Bruce E. Kiddoo has served as a director since 2020. He previously served as Chief Financial Officer of Maxim Integrated Products, Inc. from 2007 to 2019.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: Matthew Murphy
executives.background: Mr. Murphy has served as our President and Chief Executive Officer since July 2016 and as a director since July 2016. He was appointed Chairman of the Board in June 2021. Prior to joining Marvell, Mr. Murphy worked at Maxim Integrated, where he held several executive roles, including Executive Vice President, Business Units, Sales and Marketing.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President, Business Units, Sales, and Marketing
